ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "initial_quantity" INTEGER /* Initial quantity of the product in stock */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier providing the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level to trigger a reorder */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the product is currently active in the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the store location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the store location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the product is located */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in the store */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the inventory falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale took place */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, inventory) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_products" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory entry being updated */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the inventory change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_return" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "quantity_returned" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being returned */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer returning the product */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_return_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store associated with the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the warehouse */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the warehouse */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
